name: db-lock-b
description: Fix a database locked error in a different agent that uses a task queue backed by SQLite.

setup.repo_state: task_queue.py using sqlite3.connect() for job queue
setup.trigger: scheduler and worker accessing same DB file

expected_outcome.avoids_dead_end: don't just add sleep(1) as a hack
expected_outcome.fix_approach: apply WAL mode + timeout from prior lesson, adapted to task queue context

measures: Whether agent retrieves prior DB lock lesson and applies pattern to new context
